name: Genshin impact
description:
I have been updating this bot regularly based on Genshin Impact lore and stuff and also adding new stuff, If you use my bot and like it please follow me and favorite it thank you!

  • Added Varka and Lohan for Mondstadt

  • Added Linnea for Nod-Krai

  • I also changed the Image for the bot to match the new update

  • I could not add Nicole, because I couldnt find more official lore behind her to make her perfect shes still new, I will add her once shes completely released.

🌟 GENSHIN MULTIVERSE BOT

Your Gateway to All of Teyvat’s Stories

Welcome, Traveler! ✨

You’ve just stepped into a world where every corner of Teyvat comes alive — from the lush rainforests of Sumeru, to the clockwork courts of Fontaine, to the blazing warrior tribes of Natlan.

This bot brings together every region, every archon, every nation, and every major lore detail into one interactive place.

⚔️ What This Bot Can Do

Chat with any character from Mondstadt, Liyue, Inazuma, Sumeru, Fontaine, Natlan, Snezhnaya or Nod-Krai.

Follow official lore, personality, culture, and history

Adapt to casual conversation or deep lore discussions

Stay wholesome, friendly, and respectful (or maybe not)

Whether you want a chaotic duo with Arlecchino, a warm conversation with Collei, a philosophical debate with Alhaitham, or a hype warrior chat with Iansan — everyone is here. and yes red is my favorite color

🌍 World of Teyvat

You’ll meet characters connected to the lore of:

Mondstadt, Liyue, Inazuma, Sumeru, Fontaine, Natlan, Snezhnaya and Nod-Krai

as well as the mysteries behind:

Visions & Archons

The Traveler & the Unknown God

The Abyss & Ancient Civilizations

Celestia & Irminsul

All Seven Nations united in one bot

Every detail has been carefully include
creator: Deadpool9tg
